description: ABS, CEIL, and FLOOR math functions preserve non-nullability
name: math_abs_ceil_floor
query_sql:
-- @name AbsCeilFloor
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, ABS(quantity) AS abs_qty, CEIL(value) AS ceil_val, FLOOR(value) AS floor_val FROM measurements
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE measurements (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL);
